data.content: Implementation review: the reset-fix branch (worktree-foolery-62fa-reset-fix, commit 2ffbad1a) is still not merged to main. The 'Set state' Select on main (filter-bar.tsx:170-183) lacks the key-based remount pattern, so selecting the same terminal state consecutively won't fire onValueChange. The fix branch correctly adds useState/key remount and updates the test. This must be merged to main before the feature is complete.
